title: Gauff's horror miss sets up historic all-Czech Wimbledon women's final
summary: Coco Gauff is left to rue a regulation miss on match point as Karolina Muchová and Linda Nosková set up an all-Czech date at Wimbledon.
imageAlt: Gauff's horror miss sets up historic all-Czech Wimbledon women's final
aiSummary: Coco Gauff is left to rue a regulation miss on match point as Karolina Muchová and Linda Nosková set up an all-Czech date at Wimbledon.
keyPoints: Gauff's horror miss sets up historic all-Czech Wimbledon women's final
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de internacional.

multimedia.alt: Gauff's horror miss sets up historic all-Czech Wimbledon women's final
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada

fullArticle:
Coco Gauff (pictured) missed an easy forehand on match point that would have sent her through to her first Wimbledon final. (Visionhaus/Getty Images)

Coco Gauff has been ousted by Karolina Muchová in her Wimbledon semifinal after a nightmare miss on match point.

Gauff's missed forehand allowed Muchová to claim the third-set match tiebreak 12-10.

Muchová will face her Czech compatriot Linda Nosková in the Wimbledon women's final, with the clash the first all-Czech final in the tournament's 149-year history.

Coco Gauff has squandered a golden opportunity to reach the Wimbledon final after losing her semifinal to Karolina Muchová despite holding match point at one stage.

In a third-set match tiebreak to decide a magnificent sunshine-laden semifinal on Centre Court, Gauff will surely fore...
